features.name: Tableau Workbook (.twb) File Integration
features.description: Enables Datagrok to open and preview Tableau .twb workbook files by registering a file-import handler and an in-browser file viewer for the format.
features.evidence_summary: Both functions share the 'twb' extension target and together cover the full fileHandler + fileViewer lifecycle for Tableau workbooks; the readme documents this combined capability.
